title: Context Menu Opening Event
description: Represents the event payload when a context menu is about to open. This event allows you to modify the menu items or cancel the opening process.

props.name: items
props.description: The array of menu items that will be displayed in the context menu.

props.name: canceled
props.description: A flag that can be set to true to cancel the opening of the context menu.

props.name: targetElement
props.description: The HTML element that triggered the context menu opening.
